## Summary

- Describe the change and operational impact.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests/checks run locally and results pasted in PR.
- [ ] Docs touched for user/operator-facing behavior changes.

## Docs validation checklist (CLI/ops)

- [ ] `docs/operator_playbook.md` command examples still match current CLI flags/subcommands.
- [ ] `README.md` links to current protocol/operations docs.
- [ ] `docs/protocol_notes.md` links to current operator playbook.
- [ ] Troubleshooting and observability sections reflect current error codes/events.
